message:
test(sync+channel): wave 33 – 10 data-type trait tests for contended_mutex + session

Cover LockMetricsSnapshot Debug/Clone/Default, ContendedMutex Debug,
ContendedMutexGuard Debug. Cover TrackedSender Debug/Clone/is_closed,
TrackedPermit Debug, TrackedOneshotSender Debug/is_closed,
TrackedOneshotPermit Debug/is_closed.
